# User Stories

Canonical planning root for this project.

Rules:
1. Planning/backlog docs live under `.github/user-stories/**`.
2. Executable story artifacts (`US-*`, `SLD-*`, `SMK-*`) live in project module artifact roots.
3. Story IDs are immutable; update in-place.
4. Every story includes Epic, Status, Verified, Acceptance Criteria, QA/Evidence, and Test Plan.
